investigation.why_appearing: DIMENSION entities on layer -S-STIRUP with blank/space override and actual_measurement ~686.71 mm, rounded to 687 by D.1.7.
investigation.displayed_in_drawing: yes — AutoCAD renders the measured stirrup zone length (~687 mm), not an explicit engineering callout string.
investigation.should_be_retained: no for engineering annotation parsing — geometric stirrup segment lengths, not spacing callouts.

investigation.why_appearing: Value 2L-Y8@100/200/100C/C appears 9 times from explicit dimension text overrides.

investigation.should_be_retained: beam dimensions (500, 1900) yes for geometry; stirrup segment lengths (687, 688) no for reinforcement parsing.
investigation.exclude_from_engineering_parsing: yes for stirrup geometry segments; no for primary beam span/depth dimensions if used in D.2 geometry.
